properties.remark: IN THE TOWN OF CONNOR - TSTM WINDS RIPPED SOME METAL ROOFING OFF OF A GARAGE ROOF AND TOOK THE SKIRTING OFF OF THE FRONT OF THE HOUSE. ALSO, GARAGE WAS LIFTED AND PUSHED A BIT TO THE EAST.
